description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black base and a white lever handle on top. The front features a large, rectangular label with safety instructions, hazard pictograms, and usage guidelines, predominantly in white, green, and red. A black hose is attached near the top, curving downward and secured to the side, ending in a nozzle. The extinguisher's body is made of metal, likely steel, with a glossy painted finish, while the handle and lever are plastic or coated metal. The base is wider and appears to be made of a durable, impact-resistant material, possibly rubber or plastic. No mounting bracket or pressure gauge is visible, and the safety pin is not clearly shown.
description: A red metal fire extinguisher with a white handle, black hose, and a large instructional label on the front. The base is black and sturdy, and the hose is attached to the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, white handle, and black hose attached to the side.
description_view_1: Rear-top view highlighting the plain red back, white handle, and the absence of labels or additional features.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the smooth red cylinder, white handle, and the black hose curving along the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the black hose running vertically along the back and the plain red surface with part of the label visible on the side.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular label on the front with white, green, and red text, pictograms, and safety instructions.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black hose attached near the top, curving down the side, ending in a nozzle; hose is flexible and secured to the body.
